room.description: A small dimly lit room. There is a knob on the wall next to the single door.

great-hall.name: Great Hall
great-hall.description: An expansive main room with a huge table in the middle surrounded by chairs

throne-room.name: Throne Room
throne-room.description: A grand room with a majestic throne on a raised platform on one end.

bedroom.name: Bedroom
bedroom.description: A lavish royal bedchamber. The curtained bed sits in the middle of the room.

bathroom.name: Bathroom
bathroom.description: An elegant bathroom with gilded appliances.

courtyard.name: Courtyard
courtyard.description: A beautifully planted yard with a fountain in the middle and a hedge maze.

interior.name: Wooden Shack
interior.description: A worn-down room with a cauldron in the center. Dried herbs hang from the ceiling. One wall is entirely bookcases.

yard.name: Yard
yard.description: A small outdoor space enclosed by fences. There is a garden bed in one half and the embers of a bonfire.

forest.name: Forest
forest.description: An old forest with huge trees and deep undergrowth.

square.name: Village Sqaure
square.description: A central area of a village that is very empty. There is a large statue in the center.

food-stall.name: Food Stall
food-stall.description: A wooden stall that advertises food for sale. There is no one here.

blacksmith.name: Blacksmith
blacksmith.description: A clearly well used smithy. Tools have been left around, there appear to still be some coals alive in the furnace.

knob.name: Knob
knob.description: A small triangular knob on the wall next to the only door.

chair.name: Chair
chair.description: A wooden chair like the many others around the table. There is a cushion on the seat.

action.use: As you sit, you see a jewel peeking out from under the cushion.

table.name: Huge Table
table.description: A huge table with the remnants of a feast, with carrots, bread, and a jug

blue-jewel.name: Blue Jewel
blue-jewel.description: A small beautiful round blue jewel

green-jewel.name: Green Jewel
green-jewel.description: A small beautiful square green jewel

yellow-jewel.name: Yellow Jewel
yellow-jewel.description: A small beautiful round yellow jewel

purple-jewel.name: Purple Jewel
purple-jewel.description: A small beautiful square purple jewel
